extension.description: Unified plugin: Skin Installer, Skin Switcher, Userdata Backup & Restore, OpenWizard, and ABUKARIM Wizard.
extension.news: v1.6.8.5 - Patcher: addon_data target support. Deploy 4 TMDbHelper player JSONs (POV/Umbrella search-mode) post-restore. v1.6.8.4 - TMDbHelper: suppress "not playable" popup for source-select players (dummy strm-gate fix). v1.6.8.3 - RedLight sources_results: dark unfocused card (FF1F2020) - fixes white rows in TIDB results window. v1.6.8.2 - AF3: dark focus highlight (ff202020) fixes white select-dialog rows (TIDB/Seren etc). v1.6.6 - Removed all RedLight patch entries and theme-reset logic.
